rationale: The citation to Lee and Bradlow (2011) is used as a background example of prior market-structure/competitor-identification work using online review text and other nontraditional data sources. In the citing paper, it appears in grouped literature references and in a comparison table, without a distinct role in model construction, variable definitions, or empirical implementation. The CSIS-based demand-system approach, simulations, and hotel application do not directly build on or test Lee and Bradlow's specific method.
